en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.

NEN 4400 certification is mandatory for all companies providing (temporary) staffing services or performing contracting or subcontracting work. Entities based outside the Netherlands are required to hold the NEN 4400-2 certificate, the international equivalent.
Is your company required to maintain NEN 4400-1 or NEN 4400-2 certification as administered by the Labour Standards Foundation?
Article 7, section 1 of the Registration Regulation
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from obtaining NEN 4400-1 or NEN 4400-2 certification.
The company is not based in the Netherlands and has no employees working in the Netherlands.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no employees in the Netherlands.
The company does not supply temporary contacts or subcontractors and it does not fall under the regulatory definitions for temporary work agencies or contracting work.
Please explain why your company is not required to obtain NEN 4400-1 or NEN 4400-2 certification.
